overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk urban plaza in a video game, transitioning from an open seating area with digital billboards into a neon-lit covered corridor with reflective floors and palm tree planters.

approaching the entrance to the covered corridor ahead

group of individuals seated on benches conversing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright, open-air futuristic plaza with polished marble flooring. The camera moves past curved seating areas where pedestrians relax, while large planters with palm trees line the walkway. A prominent digital billboard displaying a red face with 'MOUTH' text dominates the right side as the camera approaches a covered corridor entrance in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway lined with planters and holographic advertisements

events.description: entering the covered corridor from the open plaza
passing by a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the covered walkway passing other pedestrians and digital displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in business attire walking toward the camera
person in bright orange jacket walking away from camera

entered.detail: teal neon light strips framing the corridor entrance and ceiling edges
large advertisement display showing a figure in blue outfit

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway framed by teal neon lights, transitioning from the open plaza. Large planters with palms now line both sides of the path while digital billboards display advertisements on the walls. The corridor narrows slightly as the camera passes pedestrians walking in both directions, with the reflective marble floor mirroring the overhead structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit interior corridor with reflective flooring and geometric ceiling patterns

events.description: transitioning to deeper corridor with dominant neon ceiling lighting and reduced natural light
continuing straight through the corridor as it extends into the distance

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the corridor surrounded by teal and yellow neon lighting reflecting off the polished floor

notable_agents.action: small group of pedestrians walking ahead in the corridor distance

entered.detail: illuminated ceiling panels with geometric teal and yellow patterns
yellow chevron-patterned light strips mounted on corridor walls
yellow chevron-patterned light strips mounted on corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves deeper into the enclosed corridor where natural light disappears, replaced by vibrant teal and yellow neon lighting. The ceiling features illuminated geometric panels while chevron-patterned lights line the walls, all reflecting off the highly polished marble floor. The corridor stretches ahead with pedestrians visible in the distance, creating a immersive cyberpunk atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air futuristic plaza into a deeply immersive, neon-lit cyberpunk corridor. It begins by gliding across polished marble flooring past curved seating areas and palm tree planters, moving toward a prominent digital billboard featuring a red face. As the camera reaches the entrance of a covered walkway, the open sky vanishes and the environment transitions into a space framed by teal neon lights and reflective surfaces. The scene then narrows as it passes pedestrians and wall-mounted advertisements, with the natural light gradually disappearing. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the enclosure where vibrant teal and yellow geometric panels and chevron-patterned lights dominate the atmosphere, mirroring perfectly off the highly polished floor.
